Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing And Of Nonappearance (Motions)
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Daya Baran.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:33 a.m.

Angelika Sidoruk, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
Joseph Reed, Loan Workout Specialist and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Sidoruk and Mr. Reed appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Daya Baran.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts was filed on February 25, 2021, and personally served on defendant Daya Baran on August 7, 2021.
Default as to defendant Daya Baran was entered on September 27, 2021.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Credit Card Agreement......................................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant Daya Baran, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,591.04.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $585.00.

Total - $27,976.04.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

Proceedings concluded at 10:49 a.m.
